title: eragrostis leporina
intro: Eragrostis leporina, also known as Leptochloa dubia or Crab Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and may also have antiseptic and antifungal effects. In herbal preparations, Eragrostis leporina can be used in teas, infusions, or as a decoction, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
